channel.title: business on SantiBlog
channel.description: Recent content in business on SantiBlog

item.title: Nontechnical Meetings and How to Make Them Better
item.description: Nontechnical Meetings and How to Make Them Better Time Activity 10 minutes On a sheet of paper, thoughtfully right out your completed action items from the previous week, and your action items foe the coming week. Identify any potential problems at the end (three sections, 3 minutes per section) 0 minutes Pass the paper to the person to your left 1 minute Review and mentally prepare to pitch and represent your coworker’s week 3 minutes Explain their week to the group.
